What do Himalayan salt stones do for a massage?

expanded_element.title: Experience the Healing Power of Himalayan Salt Stone Massage
expanded_element.description: By reducing tension and inducing relaxation, Himalayan Salt Stone Massage can improve sleep quality. Clients often report deeper and more restful sleep following a session. The slightly coarse texture of the salt stones provides gentle exfoliation, removing dead skin cells and leaving the skin smooth and revitalized.

items.title: Is Himalayan salt stone massage worth it?

expanded_element.title: The Benefits of Himalayan Salt Stone Massage
expanded_element.description: One major benefit of this massage is an improvement in the skin's appearance. The mineral content in Himalayan salt provides exfoliation and improves circulation, leaving the Clients' skin looking smooth and soft. As this massage utilizes heated salt stones, Himalayan salt can also work as an anti-inflammatory tool.

items.title: What is the difference between a hot stone massage and a Himalayan salt stone massage?

expanded_element.title: What is the difference between a Hot Stone Massage and a Warm ...
expanded_element.description: While both massages offer warmth and relaxation, a hot stone massage is typically deeper and more intense, focusing on muscle relief, whereas a warm Himalayan salt stone massage provides a soothing experience with added skincare and energetic benefits.

items.title: Is Himalayan salt good for eczema?

expanded_element.title: Himalayan Salt: Is It Good for You? - WebMD
expanded_element.description: Himalayan salt may be good for skin conditions like eczema, although this has not been proven and may also depend on where it's sourced. The National Eczema Association recommends adding a cup of salt to bathwater as a relief for eczema flare-ups.
